topic: 青少年足球运动员 ACL 损伤预防训练

pico.intervention_or_exposure: ACL injury prevention neuromuscular training proprioceptive training balance training plyometric training
pico.outcomes: ACL injury knee injury injury rate risk reduction
pico.study_design_preference: RCT / systematic review / meta-analysis / clinical trial

searches.query: (adolescent[Title/Abstract] OR youth[Title/Abstract] OR young[Title/Abstract] OR teen*[Title/Abstract]) AND (soccer[Title/Abstract] OR football[Title/Abstract]) AND (ACL[Title/Abstract] OR anterior cruciate ligament[Title/Abstract]) AND (injury prevention[Title/Abstract] OR prevention training[Title/Abstract] OR neuromuscular training[Title/Abstract] OR proprioceptive training[Title/Abstract] OR balance training[Title/Abstract] OR plyometric[Title/Abstract]) AND (randomized controlled trial[Publication Type] OR clinical trial[Publication Type] OR meta-analysis[Publication Type] OR systematic review[Publication Type]) NOT (animal[Title/Abstract] OR rat[Title/Abstract] OR mouse[Title/Abstract] OR cell[Title/Abstract] OR in vitro[Title/Abstract] OR cadaver[Title/Abstract])
